bio: Cris MJ, ElMA$KE$UENA, De La 17 Septiembre, La Serena Chile, is a Chilean singer and composer known for his greatest success in 2021 "Una noche en Medellín", which has been the most listened to Chilean song in the history of music, which has helped him to establish himself as a rising star in the Latin American music scene. His music is characterized by its captivating mix between reggaeton, trap and pop that touches on themes of love, relationships and money.
